name: Stuffed Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 1 Pound Extra Large Shrimp, peeled and deveined
1/2 Pound Boiled Shrimp, peeled and deveined
1/4 Pound Oleo or Oil, to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onions and celery in oil or oleo in a heavy pot until onions are wilted.
2. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
3. Grind boiled shrimp and crabmeat in a food chopper.
4. Mix ground shrimp with onion mixture and cook for 15 minutes over medium heat.
5. Add soaked hamburger buns; mix well.
6. Add bell pepper, remaining celery, green onion tops, parsley, and bread crumbs; mix well.
7. Split each large shrimp lengthwise almost to the end and flatten out.
8. Stuff centers of shrimp with mixture, holding each shrimp in hand and squeezing together.
9. Dust stuffed shrimp with flour, then coat with batter.
10. Fry quickly for 5 minutes in hot fat (375°F). Drain on paper towels.
